case_title: LAUREL MOUSSEAU ET AL VS. CITY BALLET SCHOOL, LLC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) WIFE APPEARING ON BEHALF OF HER HUSBAND. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOM, RICHARD
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY BALLET SCHOOL, LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-23-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-23-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF LAUREL MOUSSEAU IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF RICHARD HOM IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LAUREL MOUSSEAU, WIFE. DEFENDANT CITY BALLET SCHOOL LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY KENNETH PATSEL ADMIRATIVE DIRECTOR. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY BALLET SCHOOL, LLC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
ORDER DENYING REQUEST TO ADVANCE TRIAL: THE REQUEST DID NOT INCLUDE A GOOD REASON FOR THE ADVANCEMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $92.75 - SERVED SEP-05-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CITY BALLET SCHOOL, LLC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-23-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOUSSEAU, LAUREL HOM, RICHARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY BALLET SCHOOL, LLC. $2,854.38 PRINCIPAL, $142.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,996.88, DEFENDANT CITY BALLET SCHOOL, LLC SHALL PAY PLAINTIFFS LAUREL MOUSSEAU AND RICHARD HOM JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,854.38 FILED BY MOUSSEAU, LAUREL HOM, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT CITY BALLET SCHOOL, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-23-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-11-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
